prompt: A large outdoor celebration with over 100 people arranged in a clear repeating spatial pattern. The crowd is organized into evenly spaced groups of five individuals across the entire scene. In each group of five, exactly one person is visually distinct: slightly desaturated, softly blurred, with faint particle dispersion and emotionally withdrawn body language. This pattern repeats consistently across the entire image. Overhead string lights are arranged in straight parallel rows. Every fifth bulb is dim or flickering, aligned directly above each of the desaturated individuals, creating a visible structural pattern. The majority of people stand in warm golden light, while the affected individuals stand in subtle shadow pockets where light does not fully reach. The perspective is slightly elevated to reveal the repeating pattern clearly across the entire crowd. No glowing lines, no abstract visual effects. The data is embedded through spatial repetition and lighting. High realism, cinematic composition, natural crowd behavior but mathematically structured layout.
insight: Nearly 1 in 7 people in the world live with a mental disorder
